untranslatable_reason: Signal requires momentum indicator (momentum <= 0) which is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. Only MACD-derived momentum proxies (macd, macd_signal, macd_hist) are available. Additionally, the exact threshold value for 'price falls below SMA by threshold amount' is marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in the source and cannot be determined without explicit calibration.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture mean reversion logic: entry when price closes below SMA_20 with price positioned in lower 30% of 20-bar range. Exit on mean reversion (close crosses above SMA_20). Original source code shows momentum-based exit (momentum <= 0) but momentum indicator is not available in allowed set. Consider using macd_hist <= 0 as alternative if momentum exit is critical.
